info.name: EduSuite API — Core Module
info.description:
Test suite for all Core module endpoints (Groups 1–6).

## Folders
00 — Auth
01 — Tenant self-service (GET/PATCH /core/tenants/me + subscriptions + flags)
02 — Departments (list, get, create, update)
03 — Members (list, filter, patch system_role + institutional_email, delete)
04 — User identity (GET user, PATCH name fields, name history)
05 — Emails (list, add, patch, primary-delete guard)
06 — Phones (list, add, patch, primary-delete guard)
07 — Addresses (list, add, patch, delete)
08 — Emergency contacts (list, add, patch email null, delete)
09 — Roles (list, grant, upsert re-grant, revoke, guards)
10 — Audit logs (list with filters, single entry)
11 — Cleanup

## Notes
- Folders 03–10 cascade IDs via collection variables.
- Folder 03 deletes Lupin's membership — re-run the seed to restore it.
- Folder 04 renames Ron's last name to 'Weasley-Granger' — re-seed to reset.
- Folder 10 (audit logs) depends on folders 01–09 having generated audit entries. The audit trigger fires on most writes.
- The `user_roles` table is separate from `system_role` in `tenant_memberships`. GET /roles returns fine-grained role grants, not the membership system_role.

## Tenant
All requests use **Hogwarts School** (`hogwarts.edu`) — `admin_hogwarts` / `password`.

exec: console.log('✅ Logged in — core module test suite starting');

item.name: PATCH departments/:id — update head to McGonagall

exec: pm.test('At least 3 faculty (McGonagall, Snape, Lupin)', () => pm.expect(b.total).to.be.at.least(3));

item.name: DELETE last-admin guard — note (reads Dumbledore's role)

exec: // If only 1 admin remains, DELETE on that admin should return 409.
// Test the guard by attempting to delete the last admin and expecting 409.
console.log('Legal name change recorded — check name-history endpoint');

item.name: PATCH /core/users/:id — 400 legal name change without reason
GET /core/users/:id/name-history — Ron (1 entry from change above)

exec: console.log('Name history entries for Ron:', b.length);

item.name: DELETE emergency-contacts/:id — primary (allowed — no guard for EC)

exec: console.log('Snape fine-grained roles:', pm.response.json().length, '(0 expected — system_role is in memberships not user_roles)');

item.name: POST roles — 400 expiry in the past
GET roles — Neville (faculty revoked, staff still active)

exec: console.warn('No audit log entries yet — operations above should have generated some');
throw new Error('audit_log_id not set — run the list request first');
console.log('Audit entry:', b.action, 'on', b.target_table, '— sensitive:', b.is_sensitive);
console.log('✅ Core module collection complete. Session revoked.');
